news.headline: DOGE targets US computer systems. Significant risk ahead.
Homer City Redevelopment & Kiewit announce country's largest nat gas data center on a 3,200-acre campus.
news.summary: Homer City Redevelopment (HCR) and Kiewit Power Constructors Co. revealed plans for the old Homer City Generating Station in Homer City, Pennsylvania. Once the state's biggest coal-burning power plant, it will undergo a major transformation into a massive 3,200-acre data center campus. The campus will run on natural gas power and cater to the increasing demands in artificial intelligence (AI) and high-performance computing (HPC) of tech companies in the U.S. This strategic move aims to keep up with the evolving digital landscape and meet the industry's requirements.

news.headline: Permian Resources in Midland, Texas to discuss Q1 2025 earnings in conference call.
news.summary: Permian Resources has disclosed that they will be holding a conference call to discuss their earnings for the first quarter of 2025 in Midland, Texas. This information was made public through a Business Wire announcement.

news.headline: Baskin-Robbins introduces Paloma Paradise flavor of the month with no tequila, a grapefruit-citrus delight. Bold tropical vibes.
news.summary: In Canton, Mass., Baskin-Robbins® is launching a new Flavor of the Month, Paloma Paradise*. This vibrant offering brings the refreshing tastes of a paloma cocktail without the tequila. Paloma Paradise features paloma-flavored ice cream and sorbet with mild chili pepper lime swirls for a hint of spice. Inspired by the popular cocktail, this scoop embodies bold tropical vibes. The new flavor is geared towards those seeking a refreshing spring treat.

news.headline: Allegion acquires Trimco Hardware to enhance Americas portfolio, a leading manufacturer in the U.S. with 75-year history.
news.summary: Dublin-based Allegion plc (NYSE: ALLE), a top global security products and solutions provider, has completed the acquisition of Trimco Hardware (Trimco), a major North American door hardware manufacturer. The transaction includes all Trimco brands and assets. Trimco, headquartered in Oceanside, California, specializes in high-performance and custom-designed door hardware tailored for commercial and institutional markets in the U.S. With a 75-year track record, Trimco is renowned for its distinctive products and innovations.

news.headline: NHL, Rogers agree on 12-year national media rights deal, bringing more games, fewer blackouts for fans.
news.summary: Rogers has secured a long-term extension of the highly sought-after hockey rights, ensuring an increase in national games and a reduction in blackouts for hockey enthusiasts. The company is pleased to retain its status as the exclusive broadcaster of NHL hockey, providing fans with more coverage than ever before.

news.headline: Leica Biosystems and Bio-Techne partner to enable protease-free workflows for spatial multiomics on BOND RX, April 2, 2025.
news.summary: Bio-Techne Corporation (NASDAQ: TECH) revealed on April 2, 2025, an extension of the partnership between its spatial biology division, Advanced Cell Diagnostics (ACD), and Leica Biosystems. Leica Biosystems, renowned for its anatomic pathology solutions, will further collaborate with ACD. This development indicates a significant move for both companies in the industry.

news.headline: Jonathan Porter becomes apree health CEO, enhancing Castlight Health brand for personalized experience. - 84 characters
news.summary: On April 2, 2025, in Seattle, apree health announced the revitalization of the Castlight Health brand to enhance personalization and streamline member guidance in the healthcare process. This initiative aims to complement Vera Whole Health's advanced primary care services. The reinvigorated brand seeks to facilitate a more tailored healthcare experience and improve navigation for members. Apree health, a prominent player in this sector, is leading this effort to innovate and enhance the healthcare journey for individuals.

news.headline: Nayya launches AI-powered platform "Leave" connecting absence planning with employee needs, personalized experience.
news.summary: A newly introduced service, Leave, offers a comprehensive leave of absence process tailored to individual employees, from initial planning to reintegration into work. Utilizing Nayya's advanced AI technology, Leave streamlines benefits selection, claims submissions, and communication channels. Launched in New York on April 2, 2025, this integrated platform enhances the leave experience, ensuring a seamless transition for employees.

news.headline: Tencarva Machinery acquires Atlantic Valve & Equipment with backing from Bessemer investors, strengthening its position in the flow control market.
news.summary: In Greensboro, North Carolina, on April 2, 2025, Tencarva Machinery Company, the leading distributor and service provider of flow control and process equipment solutions in the Southeast for industrial and municipal markets, disclosed its recent acquisition. This acquisition marks a significant move for Tencarva as it further solidifies its position in the industry. The company continues its commitment to excellence and customer satisfaction, aiming to leverage the acquisition for growth and increased market presence.

news.headline: Elijah Craig Bourbon partners with 2025 PGA Championship, releases limited 94-Proof Small Batch Commemorative Bottle.
news.summary: Elijah Craig, a renowned Bourbon brand in the United States, showcases its dedication to golf by releasing a unique 94-Proof Small Batch Bourbon to celebrate the 2025 PGA Championship at Quail Hollow Club. The special bourbon pays tribute to the prestigious event and demonstrates the brand's ongoing support for the sport. Located in Louisville, Kentucky, Elijah Craig emphasizes its commitment to quality and excellence through this exclusive product.

news.headline: Gladia launches Solaria, a multilingual speech-to-text model supporting 100 languages, including 42 underserved ones.
news.summary: Gladia, an AI transcription and audio intelligence provider, introduced Solaria on April 2, 2025, promising unparalleled precision, rapidity, and native-level transcription in 100 languages. Of these, 42 languages have not been catered to by any other Speech-to-Text (STT) model. This groundbreaking advancement in transcription technology is set to revolutionize the industry, offering a level of accuracy and efficiency unmatched by existing solutions.

news.headline: Bettear and DongSan partner to bring Wi-Fi audio streaming solutions to South Korea's hard of hearing community.
news.summary: On April 2, 2025, Bettear, a top player in cutting-edge audio streaming solutions for public venues, cultural institutions, and entertainment spaces worldwide, joined forces with DongSan, the foremost supplier of assistive listening devices in South Korea. This collaboration marks a significant milestone in the industry and signifies a promising development for both companies.

news.headline: Air Europa partners with WebCargo by Freightos, advancing digital air cargo in Europe and Latin America. (Characters: 117)
news.summary: In Barcelona, Spain on April 2, 2025, Freightos (NASDAQ: CRGO) revealed that Air Europa, a prominent Spanish airline, has become a part of WebCargo by Freightos' cargo booking platform. This collaboration signifies a significant development in the digital freight industry as Air Europa is an influential player joining the leading vendor-neutral platform. This partnership is expected to enhance the efficiency and reach of freight services provided by Air Europa through the platform.

news.headline: Trustpilot introduces new features to assist businesses with consumer insights, drive growth. The world's largest independent platform for customer feedback launches tools to help brands optimize reviews for trust and competitiveness.
news.summary: New features have been launched by Trustpilot, the world's largest independent customer feedback platform, on April 2, 2025, allowing brands to maximize the benefits of reviews. These tools help in leveraging trust as a competitive edge in the market. The platform aims to provide more than just customer feedback, enhancing the overall brand reputation. This development could aid businesses in gaining a competitive advantage based on customer reviews.

news.headline: Artlist introduces AI video generator for creators, expanding its catalog of creative AI tools. Tel Aviv, Israel - April 2, 2025.
news.summary: Artlist, a prominent creative technology company based in Tel Aviv, Israel, introduced a new addition to its range of AI tools on April 2, 2025. This latest offering includes a top-notch video and image generator, expanding its existing collection of royalty-free digital assets. Known for providing high-quality creative resources, Artlist continues to empower brands with innovative solutions.

news.headline: Branches Learning launches Math Scholarship Program for New Mexico students in Grades 3-5 to empower and uplift math skills, closing achievement gaps statewide.
news.summary: A Math Scholarship Program has been initiated by Branches Learning in Albuquerque, New Mexico on April 2, 2025. The program aims to empower elementary students in Grades 3–5 by providing live online instruction to enhance math skills and address achievement disparities. This initiative endeavors to bridge the educational gap statewide and foster academic growth.

news.headline: Keeper Security partners with CISA to enhance cybersecurity with innovative solutions. CHICAGO, April 2, 2025.
news.summary: Keeper Security has announced its dedication to prioritizing security-focused advancements, in line with CISA's recent emphasis on integrating safeguards against changing cyber risks. The company, known for its cutting-edge zero-trust and zero-knowledge Privileged Access Management solutions, made this commitment on April 2, 2025, in Chicago. This move underlines Keeper Security's ongoing efforts to enhance protection measures in a rapidly evolving digital landscape.

news.headline: Act quickly to avoid high penalties by using ez1095 software to file ACA form corrections. Developers at Halfpricesoft.com offer a solution.
news.summary: Act quickly to avoid costly penalties by using ez1095 software to submit corrections and replacements for ACA forms 1095C, 1094C, 1095B, and 1094B. Based in Redmond, Washington, developers from Halfpricesoft.com have created a streamlined process for this task. The urgency for this action is highlighted by the date of April 2, 2025, emphasizing the importance of complying with ACA regulations. Don't delay in taking advantage of this software to stay in good standing and avoid potential financial repercussions.

news.headline: Wayfair (NYSE: W) to release Q1 2025 financials on May 1, 2025 before market open; conference call at 8 a.m. ET.
news.summary: On April 2, 2025, Wayfair Inc. (NYSE:W), a leading home goods retailer, revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for the first quarter ending on March 31, 2025, before the market opens on May 1, 2025. The company will conduct a conference call at 8 a.m. Eastern Time to discuss these results.

news.headline: Roots Corp (TSX: ROOT) to host conference call on April 9, 2025 for Q4 & FY 2024 results. Meghan Roach & Leon Wu to lead.
news.summary: Toronto-based Roots Corporation, known for its premium outdoor-lifestyle brand, is set to conduct a conference call to review its performance for the fourth quarter and Fiscal Year 2024. The call, scheduled for Wednesday, April 9, 2025, will feature Ms. Meghan Roach, President & Chief Executive Officer, and Mr. Leon Wu, Chief Financial Officer, as hosts. The conference will commence at 8:00 a.m. Participants will have the opportunity to delve into the financial results and strategic outlook of the company during the call. Roots Corporation is listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the symbol ROOT.

news.headline: Southeastern Grocers donates to 8 pediatric hospitals to support children's care. A heartwarming initiative.
news.summary: Southeastern Grocers in Jacksonville, Florida, has initiated a donation program aimed at benefiting 8 pediatric hospitals. The program entails providing support to these healthcare facilities in need.

news.headline: Widex launches WIDEX ALLURE™ in Canada, promising crystal clear speech & world's first cloud-based fitting software.
news.summary: In Burlington, Ontario, Widex, part of WS Audiology, revealed its latest platform, Widex Allure™, showcasing its dedication to providing natural sound for hearing aid users. The new technology, equipped with the advanced W1 chip and Precision Hearing Technology, focuses on delivering the most authentic hearing experience yet. Widex Allure™ aims to maintain a balance between highlighting clear speech and preserving natural environmental sounds, enabling users to seamlessly engage with their surroundings. Widex has undergone a complete transformation in its approach with the introduction of this innovative platform.

news.headline: Oroco's Santo Tomás Copper Project in Sinaloa gets support from Governor for economic growth and job creation.
news.summary: In Vancouver, Canada on April 02, 2025, Oroco Resource Corp. held meetings in Culiacan, Sinaloa, with key officials including Rubén Rocha Moya, the Governor of Sinaloa, and Ricardo Velarde Cárdenas, Secretary of the Economy for Sinaloa, to discuss the Santo Tomás Copper Project in Choix, Sinaloa. Oroco's Chairman, Craig Dalziel, along with other Senior Management Team members, engaged in talks regarding the project's advancement. The Governor acknowledged the project's potential for responsible development, investment, and long-term economic growth. He highlighted the Santo Tomás Project's projected positive impact on the state economy, specifically on the Municipality of Choix, emphasizing a commitment to creating quality jobs in Choix through sustainable development practices. The company's stock symbols on the Toronto Venture Stock Exchange and the OTC market are OCO and ORRCF, respectively.

news.headline: Tonix Pharmaceuticals (Nasdaq: TNXP) CEO Seth Lederman M.D. to present at the 2025 Jones Trading Healthcare and Innovation Conference on April 9th in Las Vegas.
news.summary: Chatham, New Jersey - Tonix Pharmaceuticals Holding Corp. (Nasdaq: TNXP) will be represented by CEO Seth Lederman M.D. at the upcoming 2025 Jones Trading Healthcare and Innovation Conference on April 9, 2025, in Las Vegas, Nevada. The presentation is scheduled for 10:00 a.m. PT (1:00 p.m. ET). Tonix Pharmaceuticals is a biopharmaceutical company with both marketed products and a development pipeline.

news.headline: Nurix licenses drug discovery program to Sanofi targeting new transcription factor for autoimmune diseases. Undisclosed target distinct from STAT6 program.
news.summary: The target under consideration is a crucial controller of inflammation, different from the known STAT6 program.

news.headline: UK's PM Starmer: We are preparing for 'all eventualities' on US tariffs
China vows to increase employment opportunities by all means
Anfield Energy Inc. appoints Ross McElroy to its Board of Directors, bringing 38 years of experience.
news.summary: Anfield Energy Inc. has appointed Ross McElroy to its Board of Directors, bringing over 38 years of experience in the mining industry. McElroy, a professional geologist, has worked with major, mid-tier, and junior mining and exploration companies. His successful track record includes involvement in the discoveries of numerous world-class uranium and gold orebodies that have advanced to development and mining operations. The company's stock is listed as TSX.V: AEC, OTCQB: ANLDF, and FRANKFURT: 0AD.

news.headline: Neflamapimod slows clinical progression in dementia with Lewy bodies, as shown in 16-week extension phase of RewinD-LB study. #ADPD2025.
news.summary: In the initial 16 weeks of the Extension phase of the RewinD-LB clinical trial, neflamapimod demonstrated a slowdown in clinical progression when compared to the control group. This was evaluated through measurements such as the Clinical Dementia Rating Sum of Boxes (CDR-SB) and the Clinical Global Impression of Change (CGIC).

news.headline: NCLH and NCLC announce refinancing transaction exchanging $285.4M in principal for 0.875% 2030 Notes and $51.6M cash.
news.summary: Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Ltd. and its subsidiary NCL Corporation Ltd. have announced a note exchange agreement with certain holders of NCLC’s 5.375% Exchangeable Senior Notes due 2025. Under the agreement, $285,425,000 of the 2025 Notes will be exchanged for $285,425,000 of NCLC’s newly issued 0.875% Exchangeable Senior Notes due 2030 and a cash payment of $51,624,820, along with accrued interest. The Cash Payment is funded by a concurrent Equity Offering and completes NCLC’s obligations for the exchange.

news.headline: Bitfarms secures $300M debt facility with Macquarie Group for Panther Creek HPC project. Designated under recent prospectus.
news.summary: This announcement qualifies as a "designated news release" in relation to the Company's amended and restated prospectus supplement of December 17, 2024, connected with its short form base shelf prospectus dated November 10, 2023.

news.headline: HyperSciences receives $1.7M Phase 2 SBIR contract from DoD for hypersonic tech advancement, a milestone for aerospace growth.
news.summary: The U.S.-based company HyperSciences, Inc., specializing in advanced hypersonic propulsion and projectile technologies, has recently secured a significant contract with the U.S. Department of Defense. The $1.7 million Phase 2 SBIR contract follows their previous NASA SBIR Phase 1 contract from 2018-2019. This new contract aims to enhance the company's innovative hypersonic launch system for aerospace uses. The award of this contract signals a pivotal advancement in HyperSciences' progression into broader industrial applications.

news.headline: Winnebago settles $59.3M of convertible notes, repays $159M debt in fiscal 2025.
news.summary: Today, Winnebago Industries, Inc. disclosed the resolution in cash of the outstanding $59.3 million total principal of 1.50% unsecured convertible senior notes due on April 1, 2025 (known as the "2025 Convertible Notes"). This repayment marks a part of the $159 million debt settled by Winnebago Industries in fiscal year 2025. The company, known for being a prominent manufacturer of outdoor recreational products, made this announcement from EDEN PRAIRIE, Minnesota.

news.headline: Lantronix selected for CRN 2025 IoT 50 list showcasing top vendors in IoT innovation.
news.summary: The annual list compiled by CRN showcases the top vendors in IoT innovation. This list highlights companies at the forefront of IoT technology, with a focus on advancing the industry. The selected vendors are recognized for their cutting-edge solutions and contributions to the IoT market. This accolade serves as a testament to their commitment to driving innovation in this rapidly evolving sector.

news.headline: Vigil Neuroscience shares data on VG-3927 at AD/PD 2025 Conference: preclinical findings + Phase 1 trial results for Alzheimer's.
news.summary: A recent presentation emphasized the significant pharmacological differences of VG-3927 based on its mode of action. Additionally, the first set of clinical data from the Phase 1 SAD/MAD trial of VG-3927 showcased promising results for its use in treating Alzheimer’s disease. This trial marked a significant step forward, with the data indicating the potential effectiveness of VG-3927 in addressing AD.

news.headline: Nayax acquires Inepro Pay to expand in Benelux, strengthening distribution channels and market reach.
news.summary: Nayax has strategically acquired a company to strengthen its distribution channels and expand its market reach in the Benelux region. This acquisition will help Nayax reach a wider audience and tap into new business opportunities in the area. The move comes as part of Nayax's growth strategy to increase its presence in key markets. The acquisition is expected to significantly boost Nayax's market presence in the Benelux region, with a notable increase in distribution channels. This strategic move reflects Nayax's commitment to enhancing its market position and driving further growth in the region.

news.headline: Acumen Pharmaceuticals presents pTau217 trial progress at AD/PD 2025 & AAN Annual Meeting. Biomarker results from sabirnetug Phase 1 trial published.
news.summary: The findings from the Phase 1 INTERCEPT-AD trial of sabirnetug, a potential treatment for early Alzheimer’s disease, have been released in The Journal of Prevention of Alzheimer's Disease. The trial examined biomarkers in patients with early Alzheimer’s disease. The results of the study are significant for understanding the potential efficacy of sabirnetug in treating this condition. This development marks a significant step forward in Alzheimer's research and may offer hope for patients suffering from the disease.

news.headline: Aura Biosciences appoints Teresa Bitetti, President of Takeda's Global Oncology Business Unit, to Board of Directors.
news.summary: On April 2, 2025, Aura Biosciences, Inc. revealed the addition of Teresa Bitetti, President of the Global Oncology Business Unit at Takeda, to their Board of Directors. The company, listed on NASDAQ as AURA, focuses on developing precise treatments for solid tumors to maintain organ functionality. The appointment of Bitetti, which took effect on March 31, 2025, signifies a significant move for the clinical-stage biotechnology firm.

news.headline: Prairie Operating Co. starts 11-well development at Rusch Pad in Weld County, CO, using Precision E-Drilling Rig 461.
news.summary: Houston-based Prairie Operating Co. (Nasdaq: PROP) unveiled a new 11-well development initiative at the Rusch Pad in Weld County, Colorado. Beginning on April 1, 2025, the first well was drilled using Precision E-Drilling Rig 461. This move aligns with Prairie's efforts to boost output and optimize operations in the Denver-Julesburg (“DJ”) Basin.

news.headline: Tilray relocates cultivation of top-selling cannabis strain, Good Supply Jean Guy, to Québec facility. #1 strain in Québec.
news.summary: In Masson-Angers, Quebec, on April 02, 2025, Tilray Brands, Inc. ("Tilray"), a leading global lifestyle and consumer packaged goods company specializing in beverages, cannabis, and wellness, and a prominent player in the Quebec cannabis market, has successfully moved the production of its popular brand and strain, Good Supply Jean Guy, to its advanced facility in Masson-Angers, Quebec. The strain, which holds the top position as the best-selling cannabis strain in Quebec, has officially shifted to the new state-of-the-art production site. Tilray is listed on the Nasdaq as TLRY and on the TSX as TLRY.

news.headline: Autolus Therapeutics to partake in 24th Annual Needham Virtual Healthcare Conference on April 9, 2025 in fireside chat.
news.summary: Autolus is scheduled to participate in a fireside chat during the Needham Healthcare Conference taking place on Wednesday, April 9, 2025. The conference is expected to attract a large audience of healthcare industry professionals, investors, and analysts. Autolus will have the opportunity to discuss their latest developments, strategies, and future plans during this highly anticipated event.

news.headline: Green Thumb Industries (GTII) will report Q1 2025 earnings on May 7, 2025; owner of RISE Dispensaries.
news.summary: In Chicago and Vancouver, British Columbia, on April 2, 2025, Green Thumb Industries Inc. (Green Thumb) shared their plans to unveil the financial results for the first quarter of 2025 after market hours on Wednesday, May 7, 2025. Green Thumb, a prominent cannabis consumer packaged goods company and the proprietor of RISE Dispensaries, is listed as (CSE: GTII) on the Canadian Securities Exchange and (OTCQX: GTBIF) on the over-the-counter market.

news.headline: Generation Bio (Nasdaq:GBIO) will present at Needham Virtual Healthcare Conference on April 9th at 12:45 pm ET. CEO McDonough to participate in a fireside chat.
news.summary: In Cambridge, Massachusetts on April 2, 2025, Generation Bio Co. (Nasdaq:GBIO), a biotech firm focusing on enhancing options for individuals with T cell-driven autoimmune conditions, disclosed that Geoff McDonough, M.D., serving as the president and CEO, will engage in a fireside discussion at the 24th Annual Needham Virtual Healthcare Conference. The event is scheduled for Wednesday, April 9th at 12:45 p.m. Eastern Time.

news.headline: Signature Bank ranked No. 63 on Inc. Magazine's list of the Midwest's fastest-growing private companies, marking its eighth straight year of record profitability.
news.summary: A commercial bank in the Midwest has achieved the impressive ranking of No. 63 on a prestigious list, marking its eighth consecutive year of record profitability. Signature Bank, known for its rapid growth as an independent commercial bank, shared this exciting news from Rosemont, Illinois on April 2, 2025. This remarkable achievement highlights the bank's strong performance and dedication to financial success, solidifying its position as a key player in the industry.

news.headline: Italy's PM Meloni: I do not rule out an adequate responses to US tariffs to defend our products
US MBA Mortgage Applications Actual -1.6% (Forecast -, Previous -2.0%)
US MBA 30-Yr Mortgage Rate Actual 6.70% (Forecast -, Previous 6.71%)
Italy's PM Meloni: It's clear that an introduction of new US tariffs would hit Italian producers hard
High-performance Additives Market forecasted to reach $20.11 billion by 2029 according to MarketsandMarkets™.
news.summary: On April 2, 2025, in Delray Beach, Florida, a report was released on the High-performance Additives Market. This report covers various product types such as stabilizers, fillers, vulcanization agents, softeners, and resin. The market is categorized by function into performance additives and processing additives. It also analyzes the market across different end-use industries like automotive and medical sectors. The global forecast highlighted in the report provides insights into the industry, including key numbers and trends.
